mechanism: The fiscal multiplier being 0.3-0.6 at positive output gaps directly haircuts the Kalecki channel's EPS contribution from the headline $20-40/share to approximately $15-25/share, thinning the fiscal floor.
regime_dependence: Multiplier is state-dependent: 0.3-0.6 at positive output gaps, 1.0-2.5 in recession. Kalecki channel strengthens precisely when the economy weakens.
